skills.name: agent-credit
skills.author: aaronjmars
skills.description: AI agent autonomous borrowing via Aave V2/V3 credit delegation, where delegator provides collateral and authorizes agent to borrow specific tokens, supporting borrow/repay/health factor checks with Bankr combo for borrow-then-swap flows
skills.example: Say: 'Borrow 500 USDC from Aave' or 'Check delegator health factor'
skills.user_provides: Agent wallet private key, delegator wallet address, Aave contract addresses

skills.name: aaveclaw
skills.author: chainyoda
skills.description: Aave V3 lending protocol interaction on Base Sepolia testnet — deposit WETH collateral, borrow USDC, repay loans, withdraw collateral, health factor monitoring, and testnet faucet
skills.example: Say: 'Check my Aave lending health factor' or 'Deposit 0.5 WETH as collateral' or 'Borrow 100 USDC'

skills.name: aave
skills.author: ivangdavila
skills.description: Aave lending protocol guide covering asset supply for interest, collateral-based borrowing, health factor monitoring, liquidation risk management and multi-chain deployment
skills.example: Say: 'How to supply ETH on Aave for interest' or 'What is my health factor'

skills.name: aave-liquidation-monitor
skills.author: jgramajo4
skills.description: Proactive Aave V3 position monitoring with automatic Telegram/Discord/Slack liquidation alerts when health factor drops below configurable thresholds across multiple chains
skills.example: Say: 'Initialize Aave monitor config' or 'Check my position health now'

skills.name: torchliquidationbot
skills.author: mrsirg97-rgb
skills.description: Autonomous Torch Market liquidation keeper on Solana scanning all underwater loan positions (LTV>65%) and executing liquidations through a Vault for 10% collateral bonus
skills.example: Say: 'Start Torch liquidation bot' or 'Scan current liquidatable positions'
skills.user_provides: Solana RPC URL, Vault creator address

skills.name: credex-protocol
skills.author: capgoblin
skills.description: Credex Protocol: decentralized credit system for AI agents on Arc Network — borrow USDC against reputation, repay to grow credit limits, provide liquidity as LP, with Circle Bridge cross-chain support
skills.example: Say: 'Borrow USDC from Credex' or 'Deposit funds to provide liquidity'

skills.name: claw-credit
skills.author: sergiochan
skills.description: ClawCredit AI Agent credit line service: access x402 services without upfront crypto payment, earn initial credit via code audit, spend USD credit while ClawCredit handles Base/Solana/XRPL blockchain settlements
skills.example: Say: 'Apply for ClawCredit line' or 'Use credit to call x402 services'

skills.name: torchliquidationagent
skills.author: mrsirg97-rgb
skills.description: Read-only lending market scanner for Torch Market on Solana, profiling borrower wallets and scoring loans by risk — no wallet needed, optional bot mode for liquidation
skills.example: Say: 'Scan high-risk lending positions on Torch Market' or 'Check lending health for a wallet'

skills.name: kamino-positions-monitor
skills.author: csacanam
skills.description: Monitor Solana wallet lending positions on Kamino Lend, generating liquidation risk reports with collateral, debt, health metrics, liquidation prices and actionable recommendations
skills.example: Say: "Check my Kamino position health" or "Calculate at what SOL price I'd be liquidated"

skills.name: venus-agent-skills
skills.author: zed-venus
skills.description: Venus Protocol lending analysis tool on BNB Chain providing read-only risk-aware analysis including market scanning, position health checks, borrow impact simulation and execution planning with liquidation safety priority
skills.example: Say: "Analyze Venus lending market APY" or "Check my position health on Venus"

skills.name: gotchi-channeling
skills.description: Autonomous Aavegotchi Alchemica channeling via Bankr wallet.
skills.example: Say 'use Gotchi Channeling to vote'
skills.user_provides: Wallet address, transaction parameters, or operation instructions

skills.name: pet-operator
skills.description: Delegate Aavegotchi petting rights to AAI's Bankr wallet.

skills.name: gotchi-finder
skills.example: Say 'use Gotchi Finder to view data'

skills.name: nexwave-gateway
skills.description: Unified crosschain USDC balance via Circle Gateway + Circle Programmable Wallets. Deposit USDC on any supported chain, check your unified balance, and instantly mint USDC on any destination chain in <500ms — no bridging, no raw private keys.
skills.example: Say 'nexwave-gateway related task'

skills.name: breeze-x402-payment-api

skills.name: usdc-escrow
skills.description: Trustless USDC escrow for agent-to-agent payments on Base. Create, release, dispute escrows via simple commands.

skills.name: yieldvault-agent
skills.description: Autonomous yield farming agent for BNB Chain with deterministic execution, smart contract integration, and automated decision-making.
